title: SR 20-12: Interagency Policy Statement on Allowances for Credit Losses
title_normalized: Interagency Policy Statement on Allowances for Credit Losses
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 20-12
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This letter and the attached interagency policy statement are relevant for Federal Reserve supervised financial institutions,2 including those with less than $10 billion in total consolidated assets, that file regulatory reports prepared in accordance with GAAP.3
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
bm25_text: SR 20-12 Interagency Policy Statement on Allowances for Credit Losses This letter and the attached interagency policy statement are relevant for Federal Reserve supervised financial institutions,2 including those with less than $10 billion in total consolidated assets, that file regulatory reports prepared in accordance with GAAP.3 BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT:
